candidate_delta_vs_current_best.note: The retained current best uses triton_bwd only for the hot-split weighted scatter. This rejected gate also enabled triton_bwd for the normal standard-EP combine weighted scatter.

symptoms: Memory access fault reported by all 8 GPU nodes
GPU coredump handler failed to exec
torch.distributed.elastic reported rank 4 as the first observed failure

decision: Do not promote or retry this as a throughput candidate. Keep the retained current-best path with normal standard-EP weighted scatter on its prior backend and triton_bwd only on the hot-split scatter path unless a focused correctness fix lands for normal-combine triton_bwd backward.
interpretation: The failed run is separate from the same-scope pp_vis bubble read. It does not change the current-best schedule conclusion; it only closes this specific normal-combine scatter backend swap as unstable at the retained MBS8 shape.
